ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "instance_number" INTEGER /* Identifier for the database instance where the event occurred */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the event type */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "waits_per_sec" REAL /* Number of waits per second for the event */,
  "rate_timewaited" TEXT /* Rate of time waited for the event */,
  "snap_time" TEXT /* Snapshot time when the event was captured */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the event in seconds */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the event */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information or notes about the event */,
  "snapshot_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the snapshot the event belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_instance_number FOREIGN KEY ("instance_number") REFERENCES instances ("instance_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_snap_time FOREIGN KEY ("snap_time") REFERENCES snapshots ("snap_time"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_snapshot_id FOREIGN KEY ("snapshot_id") REFERENCES snapshots ("snapshot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instances" (
  "instance_number" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each database instance */,
  "instance_name" TEXT /* Name of the database instance */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Hostname where the instance is running */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the database software */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or virtual location of the instance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the instance */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Last time the instance was checked for performance metrics */,
  "cpu_utilization" REAL /* Current CPU utilization percentage */,
  "memory_utilization" REAL /* Current memory utilization percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Default severity level of the event type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the metric is associated with */,
  "waits_per_sec" REAL /* Number of waits per second for the event */,
  "rate_timewaited" TEXT /* Rate of time waited for the event */,
  "cpu_time" REAL /* CPU time used by the event */,
  "io_time" REAL /* I/O time used by the event */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage by the event */,
  "snapshot_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the snapshot the metric belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_snapshot_id FOREIGN KEY ("snapshot_id") REFERENCES snapshots ("snapshot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "snapshots" (
  "snapshot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each snapshot */,
  "snap_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the snapshot was taken */,
  "instance_number" INTEGER /* Identifier for the database instance */,
  "event_count" INTEGER /* Total number of events captured in the snapshot */,
  "average_waits_per_sec" REAL /* Average number of waits per second across all events */,
  "average_rate_timewaited" REAL /* Average rate of time waited across all events */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("snapshot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snapshots_instance_number FOREIGN KEY ("instance_number") REFERENCES instances ("instance_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric that triggered the alert */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value that was exceeded */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user responsible for the alert */,
  "acknowledged" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been acknowledged */,
  "acknowledged_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was acknowledged */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, dba, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for notifications */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
